package_infrastructure.details: All 7 GenixBit replacement packages compiled and verified (genixbit-os-archive-keyring, genixbit-os-apt-config, genixbit-os-base-files, genixbit-os-desktop, genixbit-os-theme, genixbit-os-wallpapers, genixbit-os-installer-config).

production_signing_readiness.details: Production HSM/KMS production signing key ceremony not executed yet. Ephemeral passphrase-protected GPG signing key used for staging isolation.

clean_install_readiness.details: Clean installation of replacement packages verified from signed staging repository.

upgrade_readiness.details: Migration from Candidate 2 legacy packages to GenixBit replacement packages verified with zero dependency loops and clean APT sources.

installer_readiness.details: Calamares/Ubiquity installer slideshow updated with transparent GenixBit OS branding.

vm_readiness.details: QEMU virtual machine UEFI and Legacy BIOS boot, live session, installer launch, clean disk install, and installed system boot verified.

hardware_testing_readiness.details: Physical bare-metal hardware matrix validation scheduled for subsequent release candidate phase.

security_readiness.details: Negative security tamper tests, tampered payload rejection, untrusted key rejection, and revoked key signature checks verified.

documentation_readiness.details: Legal attribution (UPSTREAM.md, LICENSE, OSS.md) and release gate status documented.

rollback_readiness.details: Staging repository snapshot creation, verification, and rollback verified.

production_repository_readiness.details: Production repository packages.os.genixbit.com remains NOT DEPLOYED as a static status page.
